release_description: Beatles, The - The Beatles (UK original mono first pressing, 1968 / 'misprint' / true first issue)

examples.text: The black inners have some creases and the tears. Both records have surface noise and pops throughout. Sleeve looks good from the front and back but the spine is split.

The vinyl is in perfect condition with original gloss and no marks. The jacket has minor edge wear, complete with poster NM & 4 photos Mint, as well as original back inners. An exceptional copy of a Beatles classic.
